_doc: cron     — Cron expression: min hour day month weekday (e.g., '*/5 * * * *' = every 5 min, '0 9 * * *' = daily 09:00)
model    — flash / low / high / opus / sonnet / gpt (omit to use gagaclaw.json defaults)
mode     — planning / fast (omit to use defaults)
agentic  — true/false enable tool usage (omit to use defaults)
cascadeId — Reuse this conversation; null = create new each time
nextRun  — Auto-calculated by cron.js, do not edit manually

jobs.prompt: Find 5 trending news articles that match my interests (refer to memory.md)
